css: .cls-__ID__-w{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:1080px;height:1920px;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-strip{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:#000;border-top:3px solid #FF4D00;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-row1{display:flex;white-space:nowrap;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-row2{display:flex;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-r1t{font-family:'Archivo Black','Arial Black',Impact,sans-serif;font-size:50px;color:#FF4D00;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.02em;padding:14px 0;white-space:nowrap;animation:cls-__ID__-mq 5s linear infinite;} .cls-__ID__-r2t{font-family:'Space Mono','Courier New',monospace;font-size:20px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px 0;white-space:nowrap;animation:cls-__ID__-mq-r 9s linear infinite;} @keyframes cls-__ID__-mq{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}} @keyframes cls-__ID__-mq-r{from{transform:translateX(-50%)}to{transform:translateX(0)}}

css: .cls-__ID__-w{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:1080px;height:1920px;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-header{position:absolute;top:80px;left:60px;right:60px;} .cls-__ID__-h-lbl{font-family:'Space Mono','Courier New',monospace;font-size:20px;color:rgba(0,0,0,.5);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.02em;margin-bottom:10px;} .cls-__ID__-h-title{font-family:'Archivo Black','Arial Black',Impact,sans-serif;font-size:100px;color:#000;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.04em;line-height:.85;border-bottom:3px solid #FF4D00;padding-bottom:14px;} .cls-__ID__-list{position:absolute;top:340px;left:60px;right:60px;} .cls-__ID__-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:22px;padding:13px 0;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.12);} .cls-__ID__-chk{width:52px;height:52px;background:#FF4D00;border:2px solid #000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:26px;font-weight:900;color:#000;flex-shrink:0;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;} .cls-__ID__-txt{font-family:'Archivo Black','Arial Black',Impact,sans-serif;font-size:76px;color:#000;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.04em;line-height:.9;}

css: .cls-__ID__-w{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:1080px;height:1920px;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-steps{position:absolute;top:90px;left:50px;right:50px;} .cls-__ID__-s-lbl{font-family:'Space Mono','Courier New',monospace;font-size:20px;color:rgba(0,0,0,.5);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.02em;margin-bottom:18px;} .cls-__ID__-row{display:flex;align-items:stretch;} .cls-__ID__-step{flex:1;border:2px solid #000;padding:18px;text-align:center;background:#fff;} .cls-__ID__-sn{font-family:'Space Mono','Courier New',monospace;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#FF4D00;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;} .cls-__ID__-sl{font-family:'Archivo Black','Arial Black',Impact,sans-serif;font-size:46px;color:#000;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.04em;line-height:.85;} .cls-__ID__-arr{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:48px;color:#FF4D00;padding:0 8px;display:flex;align-items:center;font-weight:900;flex-shrink:0;} .cls-__ID__-phase2{position:absolute;top:560px;left:50px;right:50px;} .cls-__ID__-p2-lbl{font-family:'Space Mono','Courier New',monospace;font-size:20px;color:rgba(0,0,0,.5);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.02em;margin-bottom:14px;} .cls-__ID__-p2-h1{font-family:'Archivo Black','Arial Black',Impact,sans-serif;font-size:140px;color:#000;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.04em;line-height:.85;} .cls-__ID__-p2-h2{font-family:'Archivo Black','Arial Black',Impact,sans-serif;font-size:140px;color:#FF4D00;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-0.04em;line-height:.85;}
